Automotive retail Launched

Jewell Tyres

Operator knowledge, turned into a market-facing platform.

A tyre retailer given a buy-online flow that actually sells — and an admin the team can run.

The numbers behind the belief

The numbers behind the belief

End to end

The full method, run for real

The exact gated 3D Process, run end to end on a 50-year business.

2 assets

Trading site + authority platform

A live trading site plus the category-authority platform play.

Investor

Memorandum + pitch narrative

Built investor-ready from the start.

CRM

Structured enquiry path

Word-of-mouth demand turned into qualified, tracked leads.

The brief, in their terms

Fifty years of deep category expertise existed, but it needed packaging into clearer market-facing assets, stronger commercial proof and a more scalable digital platform.

  1. 01Package deep tyre-category expertise into market-facing assets
  2. 02Turn relationship-led, word-of-mouth demand into a structured enquiry path
  3. 03Build commercial and investor proof for a scalable platform
What we saw

The opportunity was not just tyres. It was operator knowledge, category trust, platform authority, and qualified demand capture.

The method

The move.

01

Discover

Clarified the trading practice, the authority opportunity, and the proof story.

02

Design

Shaped the site, the investor narrative, the brand and platform direction, and the proof assets.

03

Deploy

Shipped and refined the trading site and wired the lead-flow path.

04

Deepen

Enquiry data, site behaviour and investor feedback shape the next platform iteration.

What shipped

Finished, owned, handed over.

  • Live trading site
  • Authority platform concept
  • Investor memorandum and pitch narrative
  • Brand guideline material
  • CRM and enquiry path
  • AI voice and knowledge-layer concept

The business

A real business, trading

Brand and platform, grounded in a working yard.

The takeout

The strongest proof of a method is running it on a real business. Jewell Tyres ran the exact gated process end to end — operator knowledge turned into a platform that captures demand.

Still run on the method, iteration by iteration.

Services
  • Brand
  • Website
  • Buy-online flow
  • Operations
Sectors
  • Automotive
  • Retail
  • E-commerce

A specialist retailer brought online with a buy-flow and an operations layer built around how the business actually runs. The team owns it outright and runs it day to day. Full public write-up in preparation.

“Customers can finally buy the right tyre online without a phone call — and we can run the whole thing ourselves.”

The Jewell Tyres team · Operations

Audience: Mining, earthmoving and industrial tyre buyers · Scope: SEO, CRM and content-first digital rebuild, plus investor narrative
